== Now that I have been unblocked == Now that I have been unblocked I have some plans on what I want to do here.
There is a wide variety of things that I have desperately wanted to do since I was unblocked, and I am gonna try to get the stuff resolved
=== My current drafts === Currently I have 4 drafts

Make a section on my talk page explaining what I intend on doing now that I am here on wikipedia again

== Now that I have been unblocked == Now that I have been unblocked I have some plans on what I want to do here.
There is a wide variety of things that I have desperately wanted to do since I was unblocked, and I am gonna try to get the stuff resolved
=== My current drafts === These are my 4 existing drafts which somehow still survived over the 2 year period. Here are my plans for each

== REFUND ==
=== Drafts to REFUND === These 6 drafts are ones I plan on doing a REFUND on immediately after block. That way I will reach the 10 draft cap.
{| class="wikitable" ! Draft ! REFUND Link !Comment ! ! |- | [[Draft:Amenotokotachi]] | [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Requests_for_undeletion/G13?withJS=MediaWiki:G13-restore-wizard.js&page=Draft:Amenotokotachi REFUND LINK] |Need to merge several recreations |Depending on quality might just quick delete immediately after |A split of mine and another persons work. Talk to [[User:Knowledgekid87]]

[[Draft:Unfading_Flower]] add https://www.oca.org/saints/lives/2024/04/03/100983-unfading-flower-icon-of-the-mother-of-god https://russianicons.wordpress.com/2016/06/02/the-unfading-flower-in-greek-and-russian-iconography/ https://prayerrope.co/the-icon-of-the-mother-of-god-the-unfading-flower/ https://words-of-doom.livejournal.com/944939.html https://unfading-flower.org/unfading-icon.html https://www.oca.org/saints/troparia/2023/04/03/100983-unfading-flower-icon-of-the-mother-of-god https://russianicon.com/russian-icon-mother-god-unfading-flower/ https://www.artchive.com/artwork/the-mother-of-god-the-unfading-flower-orthodox-icons-c-1700-c-1800/ ==Requests==
To a requested move on [[Sannō Ichijitsu Shintō]] -> [[Sannō Shintō]] and a categories for discussion on [[:Category:Sannō Ichijitsu Shintō]]
Fix the whole [[:Category:Corridor-type_kofun]] related problem with categories for discussion
==Talk pages to fix up==
* [[Talk:Unification Church and politics]] * [[Talk:Religious_Confucianism]] * [[Draft_talk:Kupala]] * [[Talk:Kupala]]
==Backlog stuff==
* Fix up [[User:Cewbot/Interlanguage_link_templates_need_to_fix]]
==Talking==
Make a section on my talk page explaining what I intend on doing now that I am here on wikipedia again __NOINDEX__ [[Category:Special:LonelyPages November 4 2025]]

Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] --> == Now that I have been unblocked == Now that I have been unblocked I have some plans on what I want to do here.
There is a wide variety of things that I have desperately wanted to do since I was unblocked, and I am gonna try to get the stuff resolved
=== My current drafts === These are my 4 existing drafts which somehow still survived over the 2 year period. Here are my plans for each
